hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q '"git push' && echo '{"systemMessage": "REMINDER: git push detected. You MUST now poll actively — run `gh pr view <n> --comments` and `gh pr checks <n>`. Do NOT proceed until: (1) the Claude review has posted an APPROVE comment on the most recent commit SHA, and (2) all CI checks are green. An APPROVE on a prior commit does not count — every push resets this requirement."}' || true
